prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: YEAST RNA POLYMERASE SUBUNIT RPB8, NMR, MINIMIZED AVERAGE STRUCTURE, ALPHA CARBONS ONLY. Entity description: RNA POLYMERASE. Entry keywords: NUCLEOTIDYLTRANSFERASE RPB8, RNA POLYMERASE, OB FOLD, EUKARYOTIC, YEAST, NUCLEOTIDYLTRANSFERASE. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.431507; mean_interface=0.279401; max_segment_membrane_density=0.567461; mean_disorder=0.164556. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.
